title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
